title: More Decorations 2
description: The second and improved version of More Decorations is here! An ideal modpack for construction lovers!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Decorations_2/BH_MD2_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/more-decorations-exclusive) version.** ## Here comes the second version of More Decorations, exclusive for Minecraft 1.21! Do you spend most of your game time building, decorating the inside of your house? If you really love building and decorating, you're in the right modpack. Of course, More Decorations 2 not only adds decorative mods, it adds many other add-ons mainly in charge of improving the game experience, making Minecraft much more immersive. It is an ideal modpack for players looking for a more relaxed experience, without so many mobs or impossible missions. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Decorations_2/BH_MD2_summary.webp) More Decorations 2 is the improved version of the first version, now, exclusively for NeoForge 1.21, but of course, the main goal of the modpack remains the same, that players still have the possibility to use thousands of decorative elements! What are you waiting to play it? 🔊 Immersion is essential in More Decorations 2! It will be as if you were inside the game, thanks to mods such as AmbientSounds, Sound Physics Remastered, Visual Workbench, Falling Leaves, YDM's Weapon Master, among others. 🪑 Thousands of new decorative elements, as well as building blocks, thanks to mods like Chipped, Macaw's, FramedBlocks or Handcrafted. ⛰️ You will discover new biomes and structures as you explore, exploration and adventure is essential in this modpack, therefore, we have added Biomes O' Plenty, Regions Unexplored, Explorify or Dungeon Crawl. 🌽 And don't forget about food, Farmer's Delight, as well as some add-ons have also been added! As well as the incredible Cooking for Blockheads. 😎 Of course, the modpack has the best optimization mods for NeoForge, and we would like to highlight the presence of Sodium and Iris Shaders, two mods very dear to the community, which also allow us to make use of shaders. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Decorations_2/BH_MD2_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Decorations_2/BH_MD2_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uiOQ8rgD/images/e5b8f6a1a2565187cb359d777a5477a9a24c2eae.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uiOQ8rgD/images/66c4b60b627d9d7bc471dd061bc7e11db232dc5c.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
